text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since Buena Vista
began full-scale training for her Make Debut.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay!
Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's interval training involves alternating
between 200m jogging and sprinting.
First, the jog, and then...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hah...!
Yaaahhh...!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sprinting speed is as impressive as ever,
and she's steadily improving. Her running
feels limitless...

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Buena Vista really is amazing.
Best of her generation, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. No matter what path she takes... she's
bound to be the center of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We haven't gone over the details yet.
But I know the view she wants to reach.
That would be...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Buena!
Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Special Week...!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Good work, Buena!
Here, have some milk and take a break!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week. A senior Umamusume with
many great victories. Among them...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"The Supreme Commander of Japan,"
Special Week!!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
She defeated even the
Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe Umamusume, and
with absolute authority...!
She wins the Japan Cup!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Against a field of the world's finest
Umamusume, she claimed victory as
Japan's representative in the Japan Cup.
It left a lasting impression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Buena Vista, we watched it in person.
Surrounded by excitement, shock, and awe...
We both said the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: What an incredible view...!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ...Hey. Someday, we'll definitely—!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ..."Someday, we'll reach a view like this."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The one who gave us that dazzling dream...
was Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Back at the Japan Cup, Spe was just
amazing...! Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah! She had such presence right away.
Yeah! She had such presence right away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-Waaah～! L-Let's stop, okay!?
You're making me blush～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
T-Today isn't about me...
Let's talk about this, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe～ I found it!
An article about you, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eh!?
About me...!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While taking a break, we flip through the
magazine Special Week brought along...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Umamusume to Watch This Year!"
"Even before debut, all eyes are on her!
The rising star, Buena Vista."!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Look! Even before debut, you're the only
one with a full page～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I'm really grateful!
But why... ah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Will she become the new heroine of the
Triple Tiara route?"... it says.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the Twinkle Series's Classic division,
there are two main routes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown route.
A set of three races:
Satsuki Sho, Japan Derby, and Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week followed this path and won the
Japan Derby, a dream for everyone in racing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho, Oaks, and Shuka Sho!
Those three together are called the Triple
Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Lately, girls from this route have been
getting tons of attention～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah!
The magazine also says...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Sweep Tosho, the first Tiara Umamusume
in 39 years to win the Takarazuka Kinen, has
ushered in a new 'Tiara' era..."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Vodka, who became the first Tiara
Umamusume in 64 years to win the Japan
Derby..."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Daiwa Scarlet, who beat her in the Shuka
Sho and placed second in the Arima Kinen,
has helped define a new generation..."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"...In other words, this is an era where Tiara
route Umamusume are strong!"
...Wow～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, the next part is important～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Buena Vista already stands out with her
dazzling presence at the academy. Hopefully,
this incredibly promising Umamusume will..."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"...shine on the Tiara route. And, as a
'Heroine of the era,' I hope she will excite
the Umamusume world further."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow...
That might be a bit too much praise...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That just means people have high
expectations for you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I see! Buena, you're aiming for the Tiara
route, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, it suits you
perfectly! I'd love to see you become the
heroine of your era♪
choice_data_list: Actually, we haven't decided on a goal.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah! S-Sorry for assuming～!
I just thought it was already decided...
choice_data_list: Well, the way the article says it...
Well, the way the article says it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The public is very excited about the Tiara
route. I understand they're expecting a new
heroine, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I asked her again about her
goals moving forward...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
My goal...
...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I want to take the Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You look surprised.
...Was that unexpected?
choice_data_list: I thought you'd follow Spe's path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our inspiration is Spe.
So naturally, I thought she'd follow in her
footsteps...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown route that Spe
took... that's really appealing too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But just like the magazine said...
The Tiara route is really gaining momentum.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And if I can win there...
Don't you think we'll see an amazing view?
choice_data_list: Yeah... it'd definitely be something new.
Yeah... it'd definitely be something new.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Right?
And besides...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"A breathtaking view that reaches everyone"
—Carrying as many hopes and dreams as
possible, and reaching it together... that's
our dream.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So I want to walk the path people believe in.
Because that's where the view we seek must
be.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...If people place their hopes in me, I want to
answer them. Because their dreams are my
dreams too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista's eyes shine with determination.
While others chase only their own dreams...
she embraces others' hopes without a single
hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...?
Trainer?
choice_data_list: No... We've got our big goal now!
No... We've got our big goal now!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah!
Let's aim for it...
The Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Toward the center of the era...
Her major Classic goal is set.
